info.title: bapidapi
info.description: RESTful parking-management API. All endpoints except auth/register, auth/login, auth/password/forgot, and auth/password/reset require a Bearer JWT token.

post.description: Creates a new user account and returns a JWT access token.

post.summary: Log in and obtain a JWT
post.description: Authenticates the user and returns an access token.
Blacklists the current JWT and invalidates the session.
Issues a new access token using the current valid token.
Sends a reset link to the provided email. Always returns 200 to prevent user enumeration.

200.description: Reset link sent (or silently ignored if email not found)

message.example: If an account with that email exists, a reset link has been sent.

post.description: Resets the password using the token received by email.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of drivers. Supports optional full-text search via `q`.
Returns a paginated list of parking lots. Supports filtering by location and amenities.

get.summary: Check availability of a parking lot
get.description: Returns available spot counts for the requested check-in / check-out window.

parameters.name: checkOut
parameters.description: Check-out datetime (ISO 8601), must be after checkIn

get.description: Returns a paginated list of reservations. Supports filtering by status, driver, vehicle, parking lot, and date range.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Filter reservations up to this date (ISO 8601)

post.description: Creates a new parking reservation. Returns 409 if the slot is no longer available.

delete.description: Cancels an active reservation. Returns 409 if it cannot be cancelled (e.g. already completed).

409.description: Cannot cancel reservation in its current state

get.description: Returns a paginated list of vehicles. Supports optional full-text search via `q`.
